dimensions.note: Docs-only change: added an accountColumns row to the JSON-fields table in README.md. No credential paths or secrets touched.
No logging behavior changed; only the manifest version and README were edited.

No control flow changed. Verified against source: ReportJson declares accountColumns as the per-account CSV (csvByAccount) columns and populates it from ACCOUNT_COLUMNS alongside columns; the doc now matches the emitted payload.
Documentation and manifest-version-only change; existing report tests and the quality/dry-run gates continue to cover the extension.
This is a report extension with no resource-mutating methods, so idempotency/resilience of writes does not apply; unchanged by a docs edit.
The report consumes already-collected model data and issues no external API calls, so there is no request/response contract to review; unchanged.
No new files, handles, or clients; the report allocates no external resources and the docs edit changes none.
Manifest version bumped to 2026.07.19.0 (report has no model version to align); no files added to the package surface.
